channel.title: Biomedical Engineering / Biomedizinische Technik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Biomedical Engineering / Biomedizinische Technik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: Perception of defecation intent: applied methods and technology trends
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0016

item.title: Anatomic variability of the human femur and its implications for the use of artificial bones in biomechanical testing
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0158

item.title: The intensity of subacute local biological effects after the implantation of ALBO-OS dental material based on hydroxyapatite and poly(lactide-co-glycolide): in vivo evaluation in rats
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2023-0640

item.title: Comparison of fatigue lifetime of new generation CAD/CAM crown materials on zirconia and titanium abutments in implant-supported crowns: a 3D finite element analysis
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0017

item.title: Breaking the silence: empowering the mute-deaf community through automatic sign language decoding
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2023-0245

item.title: The assessment method of lip closure ability based on sEMG nonlinear onset detection algorithms
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0107

item.title: A multi-chamber soft robot for transesophageal echocardiography: continuous kinematic matching control of soft medical robots
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0036

item.title: Radiogenomics based survival prediction of small-sample glioblastoma patients by multi-task DFFSP model
item.description: Article by Xue Fu, Chunxiao Chen, Zhiying Chen, Jie Yu, Liang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2022-0221
